chain_name: Design System Harmonization — Luminous Pastels + WCAG AA
orchestrator_notes: Agents: Read this file BEFORE starting. If orchestrator_directives contains STOP, halt immediately. All design decisions are finalized in the spec document. Reference mockups at frontend/mock/ (gitignored but present locally). The design-system-sample-v2.html is the authoritative visual reference. Key changes: agent colors → Luminous Pastels, --text-muted → #8895a8, --text-secondary → #a3aac4, tinted badges (rgba 0.15 bg + bright text), square badge geometry (border-radius 8px), stat pills replace donuts. Status colors are UNCHANGED.

sessions.title: Design Token Update & SCSS Foundation
planned_tasks: Update 6 agent hex values in design-tokens.scss (old → Luminous Pastels)
Update --text-muted from #5a6a80 to #8895a8 in main.scss CSS vars
Update --text-secondary from #8f97b7 to #a3aac4 in main.scss CSS vars
Update --border-subtle from rgba(255,255,255,0.08) to rgba(255,255,255,0.10)
Update agent-colors.scss CSS custom properties to Luminous Pastels
Add --badge-text: #0e1c2d token
Add tinted background rgba variants for each agent
Update variables.scss if agent colors referenced there
Audit all design-token-exempt comments for validity
Run npm run lint to verify zero errors
tasks_completed: Updated 6 agent hex values in design-tokens.scss: orchestrator #d4a574→#d4b08a, analyzer #e74c3c→#e07872, implementor #3498db→#6db3e4, tester #ffc300→#edba4a, researcher #27ae60→#5ec48e, reviewer #9b59b6→#ac80cc
Added --text-muted: #8895a8, --text-secondary: #a3aac4, --border-subtle: rgba(255,255,255,0.10), --badge-text: #0e1c2d to main.scss :root
Updated --color-text-secondary from #8f97b7 to #a3aac4 in main.scss
Updated all 6 agent primary/dark/light values in agent-colors.scss CSS custom properties
Added --agent-*-tinted: rgba(color, 0.15) variants for all 6 agents plus implementer/documenter aliases
variables.scss: no agent color references found — no changes needed
global-tabs.scss: no agent color or affected token references — no changes needed
Audited design-token-exempt comments: all valid (JS runtime colors, Vuetify color props, chart colors in ProjectsView, DashboardView, SetupWizard, RecentProjectsList)
npm run lint: 0 errors, 7 pre-existing warnings (unchanged)
deviations: --text-muted and --border-subtle did not previously exist as CSS custom properties — they were added as new tokens rather than updated. The #5a6a80 old value was never in the SCSS; the spec referenced a conceptual target.
--tool-codex (#9b59b6) and --tool-gemini (#3498db) in agent-colors.scss match old agent hex values but are Launch Prompt Tool Colors, not agent colors — correctly left unchanged.
sessions.notes_for_next: 0870b: agentColors.js still has old hex values (confirmed via grep). Test files (agentColors.claude-code.spec.js, useAgentData.spec.js, AgentJobModal.spec.js) will also need updates when JS values change. The SCSS foundation is complete — all CSS custom properties and SCSS variables now use Luminous Pastels. variables.scss $lightest-blue (#8f97b7) is a general palette color used for scrollbar hover, not an agent color — leave it.
cascading_impacts: All Vue components using var(--agent-*-primary) CSS vars will automatically pick up new colors
Components using SCSS $color-agent-* variables will get new colors on rebuild
New --agent-*-tinted vars available for badge backgrounds in 0870d+
sessions.summary: Updated all SCSS design tokens and CSS custom properties to Luminous Pastels palette. 3 files changed: design-tokens.scss (6 agent hex values), agent-colors.scss (6×4 primary/dark/light/tinted values + aliases), main.scss (4 new CSS vars + 1 updated). Lint passes with 0 errors.

sessions.notes_for_next: 0870d: Foundation is now complete and committed. All SCSS tokens, JS configs, test assertions, and the design system reference document use Luminous Pastels. The tinted badge pattern is demonstrated in design-system-sample.html section 2 — use rgba(color, 0.15) background + bright text + border-radius: 8px. Start with RoleBadge.vue for the square tinted badge conversion.
